headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Martin Marietta Materials, Raises Price Target to $614
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Timna Tanners   maintains Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $608 to $614.
